steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The question asks for the value of the function when $x=8$. Replace every $x$ in $f(x)=90x+6$ with $8$.

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: After substitution, compute the multiplication first and then add $6$: $$f(8)=90(8)+6=720+6=726$$ The value of the function is $726$. The answer is D.
